scores.correctness_notes: The YAML is fully correct and covers all required elements (service, HTTP health check, env vars, log target). Extra fields like on-success/on-failure are valid Pebble service fields. The explanatory notes contain a minor inaccuracy: 'Only ready-level checks affect on-check-failure restarts' is incorrect — on-check-failure works regardless of level; the level field only affects K8s probe mapping.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy in notes: claims only ready-level checks trigger on-check-failure (wrong — level does not gate on-check-failure). Also omits opentelemetry as a valid log target type, mentioning only loki and syslog. These are errors in the prose notes, not the YAML itself.
